nasb.text: God said, “This is the sign of the covenant which I am making between Me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all successive generations;

esv.text: And God said, “This is the sign of the covenant that I make between me and you and every living creature that is with you, for all future generations:

cnv.text: 神說：“這就是我與你們，與一切跟你們同在有生命的活物所立之約的記號，直到萬代；

ccb.text: 上帝说：“我与你们及各种生灵立世代永存的约，我要给这个约一个记号。

csbs.text: 神又说：“我与你们，以及同你们在一起的各样活物所立的约，延续到未来所有的世代；约的标记是这样的：
